name: Chile Verde (Pork Stew with Green Chilies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove as much fat from the pork as possible and cut into cubes.
2. Brown the meat in lard or olive oil.
3. Remove the meat and sprinkle with flour.
4. Brown onions and garlic until transparent, but not brown.
5. Add meat, oregano, chilies to onion mixture and add water to cover.
6. Simmer for 2 to 3 hours.
7. During the last half hour, add salt and pepper.
8. Cool and strain the stew.
9. Serve rolled inside flour tortillas. Serves 6.
